statement: In every magma, Equation 697 (`x = y * (x * ((z * z) * w))`) implies Equation 2873 (`x = ((x * (y * y)) * x) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0049
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z z) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op x (op y y)) x) y)
